description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a predominantly white and gold color scheme accented by red and blue highlights. The hull is streamlined, with wide, angular side panels that extend outward, giving it a futuristic and sporty appearance. The front section is sharply pointed, with a blue-tinted area that likely represents the windshield or dashboard. The rear is broad and tapers off, with a visible intake or exhaust port highlighted in red. The surface appears glossy and smooth, suggesting a hard, durable plastic or fiberglass construction. There are no visible brand logos, model names, or registration numbers on the exterior.
description: A sleek, white and gold jet ski with red and blue accents, featuring a streamlined, angular design and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated gold side panel and the blue-tinted front section.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the wide gold wings and the red intake/exhaust port.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar gold paneling and visible blue dashboard area.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full angular shape, blue dashboard, and red central section.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is not clearly visible in the images, but a raised red section at the front suggests a central control area, likely with integrated grips and controls.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat appears to be a single, elongated section with a contoured shape, finished in white and red, suitable for one or possibly two riders.
